issues.description: In 1:1 and 16:9 aspect ratio modes during playback, nearly half the screen is wasted dark/empty space between the map frame and the playback controls at the bottom. The playback controls are pushed to the very bottom of the viewport while the map content occupies only the top portion.
issues.expected: Playback controls should sit directly below the map frame, or the map frame should scale to fill available vertical space during playback on mobile.
issues.actual: Large black/dark empty region (approximately 300-400px) between the 1:1 or 16:9 map and the bottom playback controls.
issues.element: Playback container layout during non-9:16 aspect ratios

issues.description: During active playback, the time labels (e.g., '0:15 / 0:52') are not shown in the playback bar. Only the Pause button and slider track are visible. The time indication disappears when transitioning from editor to full-screen playback mode.
issues.expected: Current time and total duration should always be visible next to the playback slider during active playback.
issues.actual: Time labels are visible in editor mode but disappear during full-screen active playback. They only reappear when playback is paused and the editor UI returns.

issues.description: Several toolbar buttons have touch targets below Apple's recommended 44x44pt minimum. The undo button (32x32), share button (32x32), and aspect ratio buttons (48x30, 42x30) have heights under 44pt, making them difficult to tap reliably on mobile.
issues.expected: All interactive elements should have minimum 44x44pt touch targets per Apple HIG.
issues.actual: Undo button: 32x32, Share button: 32x32, Aspect ratio buttons: ~48x30 (height only 30pt).
issues.element: Top toolbar buttons and aspect ratio bar

issues.description: Project name 'Pacific Rim Adventure' is truncated to 'Paci...' or 'Pacifi...' in the top toolbar due to competing elements. Only about 5-6 characters are visible before truncation, making it hard to identify the project.
issues.expected: Project name should show at least enough characters to be recognizable, or use a second line / tooltip on mobile.
issues.actual: Project name truncated to ~5-6 characters ('Paci...' or 'Pacif...').

issues.description: Clicking on a location card's expand chevron (e.g., Tokyo) also seeks the playback timeline to that location's position. This dual behavior is undiscoverable and may surprise users who just want to expand the card without changing playback position.
issues.expected: Expanding a location card should only expand the card details. Seeking playback should require tapping the location name or a separate action.
issues.actual: Expanding Tokyo's card chevron automatically seeked playback from 0:00 to 0:15 (29.8%).

issues.description: The route panel collapse button ('Collapse route panel') does not appear to change the visual layout when clicked on mobile. The panel remains the same size and position.
issues.expected: Tapping collapse should minimize the route panel to give more map visibility, or provide clear visual feedback of state change.
issues.actual: Button stays in 'expanded' state and the route panel layout appears unchanged after clicking.

issues.description: Search results dropdown items do not have proper ARIA roles in the accessibility tree. The listbox 'City search results' appears empty in the a11y snapshot even though results are visually rendered.
issues.expected: Search result items should have role='option' within the listbox for screen reader accessibility.
issues.actual: The listbox element (uid=36_0) has no child option elements in the accessibility tree, despite 5+ results being visually displayed.

issues.description: The 'Quick controls' bottom sheet (opened via 'More' button) truncates the description text and requires scrolling to see all map style options. On a phone screen the sheet does not expand tall enough to show all content without scrolling.
issues.expected: Quick controls sheet should either be taller or use a more compact layout to show all options without scrolling.
issues.actual: Description text is truncated ('...change output framin') and map style row is partially cut off at bottom of viewport.

resolved_from_round_1: Bottom sheet horizontal overflow / left-side clipping is fixed -- no horizontal overflow detected (scrollWidth === clientWidth === 390)
Map now uses free ratio on mobile -- fills available width instead of tiny 16:9 letterbox
Map fitBounds works on initial load -- all 7 markers visible on the globe view
Playback controls are visible during playback with proper z-index layering
QuickStyleBar z-index fixed -- no click propagation issues observed
TopToolbar overflow-hidden working -- no horizontal overflow from toolbar buttons
All toolbar buttons are visible in single row without clipping
summary: Significant improvement from Round 1 (3/10 to 7/10). All critical Round 1 issues are resolved -- no horizontal overflow, map fills mobile width, playback controls are visible, and toolbar is contained. Remaining issues are medium-severity: wasted screen space during non-9:16 playback, small touch targets on toolbar buttons, and aggressive project name truncation. The core editing and playback flows work correctly on mobile. Aspect ratio switching works without phantom stops. Search, export dialog, and menu all function well.
